project.name: flexSocial
project.tagline: flex social is an app for artists. Solo founders, or anyone that wants to build their personal profile on social media without it taking up all of their life. The principle is simple: (1) Load information for AI analysis about yourself, your business, your organisation. Your band whatever it is that is the focus / owner / operator of the social media profile. This can be links to your website, a text dump, images like your logo, a brand guide document etc (2) Set your goals, tone, style industry, hash tags, visual guidance etc and connect your accounts (Instagram twitter, Facebook, linkedin, tiktok etc - this part is optional) (3) Provide a stream of 'raw' content - this could be an article or blog you like, a link to a podcast you were a guest on, a link to an event you are attending or hosting, an image or you drinking champagne, a silly video, a direct to camera rant a screen recording or a feature in your app etc . A link to a social media post you want to engage with, or even just a dump if your thoughts. With every content dump you indicate if you want to agree, disagree or promote it and the intensity of that agreement/disagreement/promo. Finally you can add a text dump of any specific hash tags, explain why you agree disagree etc How it works The content you load in is your base context if who you are and what you do, what you think, what you hate, why your different etc. The more the better , AI analysis it all. The settings are where you give some guidance on what your goals are (build an audience, establish a professional digital footprint, be controversial, get customers, general networking etc etc . You also are giving guidance here about the way you talk, the way you visuall present yourself etc (is it very personal, casual, serious, etc etc) The stream of content is then used to draft post 'stubs' (or flexes ) for social media, these can then be optimised for the channels that you have connected in terms of text limits, content /asset formats, style and tone optimisation for different platforms etc The agree disagree promote instructions are the magic and what turns generic auto posts into posts that set you apart and allow you to create a consistent unique presence on social media, without having it take over your life. Ai does the rest, to create assets, edit and optimise assets you provide, combine the core persona you created in step 1 with the stream of new information you provide. Every post -stub is created as a draft concept etc with the instructions for each platform naked on and you can then review it and choose the channel to post on. Which will trigger the final post creation with finalised videos/images/text/tags etc for each platform which can be scheduled
